steps.t: Adamanda waits for you outside of Nobottle. You should speak with Adamanda North-took.
The path is in Yondershire. Adamanda North-took has asked you to set a trap along a path frequently used by the lynx.
Adamanda waits for you outside of Nobottle. You should speak with Adamanda North-took.
After discovering that the lynx was a new mother, Adamanda has released the creature. You should talk to Adamanda.
